name: hunyuan-3d
notes_low: Hunyuan3D 2.1 shape-only path. Texture/PBR generation is skipped for lower VRAM.
notes_high: Hunyuan3D 2.1 shape + paint/PBR assets. Texture generation can require 21GB+ VRAM.
description: Hunyuan3D 2.1 image-to-3D generation with shape and optional PBR texture workflows.
